name: @spike/web
description: Spike product frontend for onboarding, GitHub connect, hydrate, and ask flows

scripts.lint: node --check app.js && find api -name '*.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
scripts.build: mkdir -p public && cp index.html styles.css app.js public/ && node -e "console.log('static build ok')"
